typeOfApplication.label: What do you want to apply for?
typeOfApplication.changeHint: Change what you want to apply for

options.ADJOURN: Ask to adjourn the hearing (move it to a later time or date)
options.SET_ASIDE: Ask the court to set aside (cancel) a decision the court has made

hearingInNext14Days.label: Is the court hearing in the next 14 days?
hearingInNext14Days.changeHint: Change whether the court hearing is in the next 14 days

helpWithFeesNeeded.label: Do you need help paying the fee for this application?
helpWithFeesNeeded.changeHint: Change whether you need help paying the fee for this application

options.yes: I need help paying the fee
options.no: I do not need help paying the fee

alreadyAppliedForHwf.label: Have you already applied for help with your application fee?
alreadyAppliedForHwf.changeHint: Change whether you have already applied for help with your application fee

hwfReference.label: What is your Help with Fees reference number?
hwfReference.changeHint: Change your Help with Fees reference number

otherPartiesAgreed.label: Have the other parties agreed to this application?
otherPartiesAgreed.changeHint: Change whether the other parties have agreed to this application

anyReasonNotToShare.label: Are there any reasons that this application should not be shared with the other parties?
anyReasonNotToShare.changeHint: Change whether there are any reasons that this application should not be shared with the other parties

reasonForNotSharing.label: Provide a reason this application should not be shared with the other party
reasonForNotSharing.changeHint: Change the reason this application should not be shared with the other party

whatOrderWanted.label: What order do you want the judge to make and why?
whatOrderWanted.changeHint: Change what order do you want the judge to make and why

hasSupportingDocuments.label: Do you want to upload documents to support your application?
hasSupportingDocuments.changeHint: Change whether you want to upload documents to support your application

whichLanguage.label: Which language did you use to complete this service?
whichLanguage.changeHint: Change which language you used to complete this service

statementOfTruth.theInformationFormsYourApplication: The information on this page forms your application.
statementOfTruth.whenYouAreSatisfied: When you’re satisfied that your answers are correct, you should tick the box below and write your name to “sign” this statement of truth.

checkbox.value: I believe that the facts stated in this form are true. I understand that proceedings for contempt of court may be brought against anyone who makes, or causes to be made, a false statement in a document verified by a statement of truth without an honest belief in its truth.

errors.agreeToTheStatementOfTruth: Agree to the statement of truth
